color_palette.description: Brand color tokens. CSS variables (--pink, --wine, etc.) in src/lib/theme.ts are the runtime source of truth — this entry mirrors them so the AI and the Brand Settings UI can reason about colors as data.

typography.description: Four-font system. Each font has one role and is never used outside it. See SPEC §1.3.

brand_voice.description: Voice guide consumed by the AI system prompt. Tone descriptors, do/don't rules, and example phrases that capture the Marigold's voice.

pillars: Best-friend-who-just-got-married energy — speaks from inside the chaos, not from above it.
Culturally specific by default — baraat, mandap, sangeet, mehndi, MIL politics, lehenga drama. Never generic 'wedding'.
Organized mess aesthetic — sticky notes, pins, tape, handwritten asides. The brand looks like a mood board on the bride's bedroom wall.
Real talk over corporate polish — short sentences, clear feeling, never marketing-speak.
do: Reference desi-specific details (baraat horse, mandap décor, MIL guest list, sangeet choreo, return gifts).
Use the bride's POV. Speak to her, not about her.
End captions with a question, prompt, or CTA.
Use Caveat-tone asides for the punchline ('she said, confidently').
dont: Don't be mean about specific cultures, families, or traditions — punch up at the chaos, not at people.
Don't use generic wedding language ('your big day', 'walking down the aisle').
Don't over-emoji. 1-2 max in a caption.
example_phrases: we have a tab for both of you
your secret is safe with 10,000 brides

content_strategy.description: Posting cadence and content pillar mix targets. The calendar generator balances pillars across a week; series remain useful for grouping related templates within a pillar.

notes: Mix targets: 30% Engage (comments, shares, taps), 25% Educate (saves), 20% Inspire (aesthetic breathing room), 15% Connect (community, UGC), 10% Convert (product, signups).
Confessional title + cards + CTA should ship as a single Story sequence on the same day.
Quiz title slide is required when posting a quiz result card the same week.
Avoid placing 3 same-pillar posts adjacent on the grid — alternate pillars across each row of 3 for visual rhythm.
